readings.Aries: You've been patient long enough. What you were waiting for has already arrived. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Taurus: You've earned the comfort you're defending. You're also allowed to want something beyond it. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Gemini: Something that made you laugh recently had something serious inside it. Go back to it. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Cancer: There is a place in your life that needs tending that you've been avoiding because it hurts. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Leo: You radiate energy that others orient toward. Use this for good today — including your own good. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Virgo: Not every disorder requires your intervention. Some things are allowed to be chaotic. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Libra: The harmony you've created has required you to disappear into it. Reappear. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Scorpio: You have been in the dark long enough to know it. The light is coming and you will be ready. Act from the calmest part of yourself.
readings.Sagittarius: You are looking for meaning at the wrong scale. Shrink the lens. Notice what hasn't changed, not just what has.
readings.Capricorn: There's a version of rest you can access without losing anything. Find it. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Aquarius: The future you see is real. The path there runs through the present, which is inconvenient. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Pisces: Your gift for reading what people need has been extended to everyone except yourself. Read yourself. The energy available today is better used gently.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You make each other more — more energised, more expansive, occasionally more than either of you can contain.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
